app.title: Open Design: Use Your Coding Agent as a Design Engine
app.author: steveharing1
app.description: Use your coding agent as a design engine to automate design tasks
proposed_tests: Install Open Design and run the example design task
Measure performance of Open Design vs existing design tools
Test Open Design's ability to automate a specific design workflow
